utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details including costs: 1) health_coverage: includes description and a monthly_cost value (€148). Costs are provided; however, specifics like coverage limits, deductibles are not explicitly required by the format—only 'with costs'—so this is acceptable. 2) property_coverage: has description and monthly_cost €60; meets 'with costs'. 3) travel_coverage: has description and monthly_cost €50; meets 'with costs'. 4) additional_services: has description and monthly_cost €20; meets 'with costs'. 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides 'base_options' with monthly_total 278 and annual_total expressed as '278 * 12' rather than a computed number, and similarly for 'with_optional_enhancements' annual_total as '434 * 12'. Since the annual totals are not fully computed numeric values, the annual breakdown is not fully specified. Therefore, total_budget is partially specified and should not count as fully specified according to 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Hence, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health Plan (€100) and LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Plan (€65) bundled; property coverage as LifeFirst Standard Property Coverage; travel coverage as LifeFirst Standard Travel Insurance; and a Premium Membership at €20/month. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating is 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating is 8; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home_content/property) rating is 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating is 7; Premium Insurance Membership rating is 10. The plan also mentions an optional enhancement: PrimeTravel Premium at €115/month (rating 10) and Smart Home Integration add-on at €45/month (rating 8).
